def load_data():
    df = pd.read_csv("global_population_country.csv")
    # convert 'year' to integer
    df['year'] = df['year'].astype(int)
    # ensure population is numeric, coercing error to Nan
    df['population'] = pd.to_numeric(df['population'], errors='coerce')
    df.dropna(subset=['population'], inplace=True)
    df.drop_duplicates(subset=['country', 'year'], inplace=True)
    return df

def load_data():
    # Load the dataset
    df = pd.read_csv('amazon_sales_dataset.csv')
    # Convert 'Order Date' to datetime
    df['order_date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['order_date'])
    numeric_cols = ['price', 'discount_percent', 'quantity_sold', 'rating', 'review_count', 
                    'discounted_price', 'total_revenue']
    for col in numeric_cols:
        df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors='coerce')
    df.dropna(subset=['price', 'quantity_sold', 'total_revenue', 'rating'], inplace=True)
